heading: Definitions
label: 321 Definitions
text: In this subchapter, “aeronautics”, “air commerce”, and “air navigation facility” have the same meanings given those terms in .section 40102(a) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision Notes. 97–449Pub. LRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)321(no source).A number of the source provisions of the subchapter are taken from 49:ch. 20. The text of 49:ch. 20 contains general definitions, some of which are used in those source provisions. The section includes those definitions from 49:ch. 20 that are used in the source provisions included in the subchapter.
Pub. L. 103–429This makes a clarifying amendment to 49:321.

Amendments1994— struck out “, respectively” after “of this title”.Pub.
